name: Auburn Recreational
description: Come play pickleball at Auburn Recreational in Auburn, ME! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, and water. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Lewiston High School
description: Come play pickleball at Lewiston High School in Lewiston, ME! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

name: Lewiston Recreation- Lewiston Armory
description: Lewiston Recreation- Lewiston Armory is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lewiston, ME. There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Perley Rec Field
description: Perley Rec Field is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Livermore, ME. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Poland Community School
description: Poland Community School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Poland, ME. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Poland Spring Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Poland Spring Resort in Poland, ME! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, food, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons.

name: YMCA Of Auburn-Lewiston
description: YMCA Of Auburn-Lewiston is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Auburn, ME. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved.
